## ⚠️ Please Read Before Submitting / 提交前请阅读

> [!IMPORTANT]
> **We are not accepting pull requests at this time.**
> **目前不接受任何 PR。**

**Why / 原因：** Merging a PR creates **ongoing maintenance work** (every later refactor, fix, and release must still own that code). Maintainer bandwidth is limited, so we cannot sustainably **carry** third-party patches long-term — not a judgement on your patch quality.

**合并 PR 会带来长期维护成本**（后续每次重构、修复、发版都要继续对这段代码负责）。维护者精力有限，无法长期背负第三方合并代码，**与补丁本身好坏无关**。

---

### 🔌 Have a feature idea? Write a plugin! / 有新功能需求？请尝试编写插件！

OxideTerm has a runtime plugin system that supports custom extensions without modifying the core codebase.

OxideTerm 拥有运行时插件系统，无需修改核心代码即可实现自定义扩展。

→ [Plugin Development Guide](https://github.com/karami8/oxideterm-sync/blob/main/docs/reference/PLUGIN_DEVELOPMENT.md)

---

### 💬 Have a proposal? Open an Issue first. / 有想法？请先开 Issue 讨论。

All contributions must be discussed in an Issue before a PR is opened.
Undiscussed PRs will be closed without review.

所有贡献必须先在 Issue 中讨论，未经讨论的 PR 将直接关闭，不予审查。

→ [Open an Issue](https://github.com/karami8/oxideterm-sync/issues/new)

---

*Thank you for your interest in OxideTerm! / 感谢你对 OxideTerm 的关注！*
